title: 20MW Supply Agreement Signed BY ITM Power
content: ITM Power have signed a supply agreement and binding heads of terms for a long-term services agreement with MorGen Energy for the 20MW West Wales Hydrogen project. This milestone marks a significant step in this project under the UK Governmentâ€™s Hydrogen Allocation Round 1 (HAR1). With permits secured and commercial terms with the project stakeholders nearing completion, the project is well on track towards Final Investment Decision (FID) and is expected to break ground before calendar year-end.
author: Analysts Account
